reference: WAY BACK IN THE DAYS WHEN GRANDPAP BUZZARD HAD HIS LIL FALLING OUT WITH OL KING EAGLE AND DONE FLY SO HIGH HE SCO'TCH THE FEATHERS OFFEN HIS HAID HE HAD A COUSIN DID GRANDPAP BUZZARD AND THIS COUSIN WAS JES NATURALLY LAZY AND NO COUNT
text: Way back in the days when Grandpop Buzzard had his little falling out with Old King Eagle and done fly so high he scorched the feathers offen his head, he had a cousin, did Grandpop Buzzard, and this cousin was just naturally lazy and no count.
